data.acceptance:
1. A 'Default profile' selector is present in the settings panel, populated with all profiles available from `kno profile list`.
2. Saving the setting persists the chosen profile name to the Foolery settings store and survives app restart.
3. Opening the new-beat dialog pre-selects the saved default profile; if no default is configured the existing fallback behaviour is unchanged.
4. If the saved profile no longer exists in `kno profile list`, the selector shows a visible error and the new-beat dialog falls back gracefully without silently substituting another profile.
5. No hardcoded profile name strings are introduced; profile options are always derived from the live `kno profile list` output.
